Actions.Text: AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO LOCAL GOVERNMENT
COMMITTEE DISCHARGED AND COMMITTED TO RULES

Title: Authorizes the South End Children's Cafe to file an application for a retroactive real property tax exemption with the city of Albany assessor
Summary: Authorizes the South End Children's Cafe Inc. to file an application for a retroactive real property tax exemption with the city of Albany assessor for all applicable taxes from the 2025-2026 assessment rolls.
ActClause: AN ACT to authorize the South End Children's Cafe to file an application for a retroactive real property tax exemption with the city of Albany assessor
